name: Pendulum-support bracket (left)
notes: Small back-of-frame L-bracket. Pinches the pendulum blade (piece 72) between itself and piece 19, per §II.C. Plain a/b/d tab labels on this piece are receivers for matching subscripted labels on pieces 27, 28 (plate C), and possibly piece 72 (plate H) — those connections will be wired during M2's cross-plate sidecar pass. Also visible from §II.A's pin-hole-prep list (27, 28, ...) but not piece 18 itself. Fig. 2 shows the assembled pendulum-support detail.
